title: vLLM OpenAI-compatible inference
inventory_docs: hdc run service vllm deploy — Proxmox QEMU + Docker vLLM (install.device cuda|cpu)
hdc run service vllm teardown — destroy QEMU guest; --dry-run, --yes, --instance <letter>

next_steps: OpenAI-compatible API: http://<guest-ip>:8000/v1 (or vllm.public_url when set).
Ensure HDC_HF_TOKEN is set in the vault before deploy (Hugging Face gated models).
For CUDA: complete VFIO/IOMMU on the Proxmox host and set proxmox.qemu.hostpci[] before deploy.
Optional: BIND A/CNAME + nginx-waf upstream http://<guest-ip>:8000 when exposing publicly.
